SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-01-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-01-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JEREMY JACOBS.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WESTERN FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, ANDREW $966.45 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,066.45 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
